description_long: This humanoid robot features a large, metallic, rectangular head with two prominent, circular blue eyes that resemble camera lenses, and a thin blue line running along the lower edge of the head. Two thin, zigzag antennae with spherical tips extend from the top corners of the head, giving it a playful, futuristic appearance. The robot's body is compact and boxy, with articulated arms and legs that are segmented and end in simple, claw-like hands and broad, flat feet. The arms and legs are connected to the torso with visible joints, suggesting a moderate range of motion. The overall color scheme is metallic gray with blue accents, and the surface appears smooth and slightly reflective. The back of the robot features a circular detail on the torso and a single central antenna extending from the head.
description: A metallic humanoid robot with a large rectangular head, blue camera-like eyes, zigzag antennae, and articulated limbs, finished in gray with blue highlights.
description_view_0: Front view shows the robot's expressive blue eyes, zigzag antennae, and articulated arms and legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth of the head, the single central antenna, and the profile of the limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a smooth back, a circular detail on the torso, and the central antenna extending from the head.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the head's depth, central antenna, and limb articulation.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms extended outward to the sides, legs straight and feet flat on the ground, head facing forward.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; the robot is covered in integrated metallic and plastic panels with blue accent lines.
attribute_facial_features: The face consists of two large, circular blue eyes resembling camera lenses, a thin blue line suggesting a mouth, and no visible nose or expressive features.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs are segmented with visible hinge joints at the shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees; hands are simple claws, and feet are broad and flat, suggesting moderate articulation.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Visible sensors include two large camera-like eyes on the front of the head; no other sensors are apparent.
